Question: Determine whether the series $$\sum_{n = 1}^{\infty} ( -1 )^{n + 1} n \text{/} 2^{n}$$ converges or diverges.
Find a bound for $$R_{20}$$ when approximating $$\sum_{n = 1}^{\infty} ( -1 )^{n + 1} \text{/} n$$ by $$S_{20} .$$
Determine whether the series $$\sum_{n = 1}^{\infty} ( -1 )^{n + 1} n \text{/} ( 2 n^{3} + 1 )$$ converges absolutely, converges conditionally, or diverges.
